hero.headline: Managing your business on another plane of reality.
hero.subheadline1: We don't sell software. We sell autonomy and operational efficiency.
hero.quote: The greatest fruit of self-sufficiency is freedom.
solution.description3: All managed from a single app.
solution.feature10: No waiting, at your own pace
pricing.headline: Tailored to Your Needs.
pricing.modular: Choose the modules your business requires. No rigid plans.
cta.earlyAccess: Be among the first to get access
cta.socialProofText: small businesses already on the waitlist
delta.hero.h1.line3: The problem is you can't ask it.
delta.hero.sub: The information is there. In your billing software, your CRM, the bank, your inbox. But every time you need to know something, someone has to find it, cross-reference it, and send it to you. Delta changes that.
delta.manifesto.middle: technologies to optimize processes and boost
delta.pillar1.title: connect
delta.pillar1.body: APIs across your systems — ERP, CRM, bank, tax, e-commerce. No duplicate data, no manual patches.
delta.pillar2.title: relate
delta.pillar2.body: Cross-referenced data, consolidated state, a single operational truth to make decisions with confidence.
delta.pillar3.title: integrate
delta.pillar3.body: An AI layer that acts: classifies, reconciles, suggests and executes tasks inside the flow, not outside.
delta.painPoints.item1.q: "I need to know how much we billed last month vs the year before."
delta.painPoints.item1.a: Someone takes two hours to put together the spreadsheet.
delta.painPoints.item2.q: "Which clients haven't bought from us in the last three months?"
delta.painPoints.item2.a: Nobody knows for sure. You'd have to look at the CRM, filter it, export it.
delta.painPoints.item3.q: "Which is our most profitable service this quarter?"
delta.painPoints.item3.a: Good question. Let's see who can work that out.
delta.painPoints.item4.q: "How much have we spent with vendor X this year across all areas?"
delta.painPoints.item4.a: Have to ask admin and wait until they've got a moment.
delta.painPoints.item5.q: You have a new hire. They need to understand a process.
delta.painPoints.item5.a: They're told to ask Maria — she's the one who knows.
delta.painPoints.close: If you have more than one management system and your data doesn't talk to itself, this happens every week. It isn't a people problem. It's a connection problem.
delta.proposal.heading.before: Imagine asking your business a question.
delta.proposal.intro: Not through reports. Not waiting for someone to prepare it. You, the moment you need it, ask in plain language and your business answers with real data.
delta.proposal.example1: "How are we doing this month vs last year?"
delta.proposal.example2: "Which clients are at risk of churning?"
delta.proposal.example3: "How is each location or business unit evolving?"
delta.proposal.example4: "How much did we spend on acquisition and how much have those clients generated?"
delta.proposal.example5: "Who is closing the most deals this quarter?"
delta.proposal.close: That's Delta. The connection between the information you already have and the intelligence to use it. Without moving your data. Without changing your tools. Without needing a technical team.
delta.trust.intro: Delta doesn't ask you to move anything. Your billing software is still your billing software. Your CRM is still your CRM. Delta connects to them with the permissions you choose, reads what it needs when it needs it, and every access is logged.
delta.trust.bullet1: No passwords. Delta never asks for credentials to your accounts.
delta.trust.bullet2: No migrations. Your data doesn't move to anywhere new.
delta.trust.bullet3: No clouds you don't control. Your information is yours and yours alone.
delta.trust.bullet4: No fine print. If you cancel, your data stays intact wherever it was.
delta.trust.bullet5: Full audit trail. You always know what was queried and when.
delta.sector.lawyers.title: Half your team's time goes into searching.
delta.sector.lawyers.body: Case files, client history, regulation, six-month-old emails. With Delta you find it in seconds. Without changing your software. Without technical training. Like having an associate who never forgets anything and is always available.
delta.sector.clinics.title: You have data on thousands of patients. But using it takes hours.
delta.sector.clinics.body: Knowing how many dropped a treatment, which location performs best or which services are in most demand means hours of manual work. With Delta you ask in plain language and get the answer in seconds.
delta.sector.accountants.title: Every client's history is spread across several systems.
delta.sector.accountants.body: Pulling it all together takes time you don't have. Delta cross-references that information and surfaces it in a single query. Less time searching, more time advising.
delta.sector.insurance.title: Policies, claims, clients — all in different places.
delta.sector.insurance.body: Preparing a claims report takes days. Answering a specific client question means searching across five systems. Delta connects them and answers in seconds, with full traceability.
delta.sector.general.title: If someone is wasting time consolidating information that should be together, Delta is for you.
delta.sector.general.body: Sector doesn't matter. The pattern is always the same: valuable information scattered across systems that don't talk to each other. Delta solves exactly that.
delta.results.stat1.label: Manual reports to prepare each week.
delta.results.stat2.label: Reclaimed by the leadership team every week.
delta.results.stat3.label: To answer any question about the business.
delta.results.caption: Typical outcome 90 days into running Delta.
delta.results.body: These aren't promises. They're the numbers of real businesses that had exactly the same problem you probably do: valuable information scattered across several systems, and someone on the team spending hours each week putting it together.
delta.results.quote: I knew the data was there somewhere. The problem was finding it cost me time I didn't have.
delta.results.author: Head of operations · Delta customer

sigma.pillar2.body: Taxes, treasury, reconciliation. Books always balanced, month after month, with no surprises.
sigma.pillar3.title: comply
sigma.pillar3.body: Forms, deadlines, regulations. Nothing slips through, nothing arrives late — and you decide with time, not in a rush.
